exterior.text: A squat concrete building clings to the mountainside, bristling with corroded antenna masts. The heavy steel door is closed but not locked — the latch mechanism has corroded open.

equipment_room.text: Banks of relay equipment fill the room, dead and dark. A maintenance locker is padlocked. Emergency ration stores, mandated for remote station crews, are stacked near the back wall.

choices.label: Cut through the maintenance locker padlock.

maintenance_locker.text: Spare parts, sealed tools, and a first-aid kit from an era when this equipment mattered. Also a sealed envelope marked DO NOT OPEN. You open it. Nothing useful inside. Still, the rest is worth having.

door_drop.text: The door pulls free and swings hard. The edge catches your shoulder and drops you to one knee.

electrical_arc.text: A residual charge in the equipment bank arcs through the locker and into your hands. Your vision whites out.
